data.title: GEO Missed Q1 Targets On Rising Costs And Debt, Guides Q2 Below Street Estimates
data.description: GEO Group reported lower Q1 revenue and adjusted EBITDA, missing consensus. EPS also fell short. Outlook raised for FY25 but Q2 expectations lowered.

data.title: IBM Thinks Big, AI Delivers Bigger – Why Bulls Are Charging Toward $300
data.description: IBM stock is up 48% in the past year and 13% this year, with a bullish MACD and RSI. Analysts are impressed by its AI and hybrid cloud strategy, with a $300 price target and $5B tied to its AI business.

data.title: Bitcoin Hovers Around $97,000, But A Correction May Be Around The Corner, Traders Warn
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is up to nearly $97,000, boosted by renewed liquidity from China and heightened anticipation around the FOMC's interest rate decision.

data.title: All Eyes On Powell: What Betting Markets Expect Him To Say Wednesday
data.description: Markets await Powell's messaging rather than Fed policy action as Trump's tariffs and trade tensions add pressure. Betting odds show potential policy shift in post-Powell era.
